ICICI Bank services on the GeM Portal will remain unavailable from 19th June 2026 from 8 PM to 11 PM due to scheduled maintenance by ICICI Bank. Users are advised to plan their GeM activities accordingly to avoid any potential Business disruption. Primary Buyers and Sellers/Service Providers are requested to update TReDS Exchange onboarding status in their profile (Profile -> TReDS). GeM Vendor Assessment Workshop is being conducted for prospective OEMs on GeM to impart understanding of the VA process and documentation requirements. The upcoming workshop session is planned for 19th June 2026.
